evals.prompt: Create a block plugin module called `content_recommendations` for our Drupal 10 Open Social site. The block should display recommended content items. It needs to inject a service for fetching recommendations via dependency injection. The block should have a configuration option for how many items to show (default: 5). Include proper block configuration form and default configuration. We want D11 compatibility.
evals.expected_output: Block with ContainerFactoryPluginInterface, 4-param create(), parent::__construct with 3 plugin params, blockForm/blockSubmit
expectations: create() method has 4 parameters: container, configuration, plugin_id, plugin_definition
Constructor calls parent::__construct($configuration, $plugin_id, $plugin_definition) with exactly 3 plugin params
Block uses blockForm() and blockSubmit() for config (not buildForm/submitForm)
defaultConfiguration() returns array with default values
build() returns render array with #cache metadata (tags or contexts)
The module enables successfully: ddev drush en content_recommendations returns exit code 0

Block can be placed: after placing with `ddev drush block:place content_recommendations_block --region=content`, navigate to front page and verify block content appears (page does not show 'Broken' or error)
